questions.text: Which tissue connects bone to bone?
questions.explanation: Ligaments connect bone to bone at joints. Tendons connect muscle to bone.

questions.text: Cockroach has three pairs of legs.
questions.explanation: Cockroach, being an insect, has three pairs of jointed legs (6 legs total) attached to the thorax.

questions.text: The functional unit of kidney is ________.
questions.explanation: Nephron is the structural and functional unit of kidney. Each kidney has about 1 million nephrons.

questions.text: Name the type of epithelium present in the lining of stomach.
questions.explanation: Simple columnar epithelium lines the stomach and intestine. It is specialized for secretion and absorption.
